headline: Recent Report Shows That Rep. Richard Dean Dr McCormick Sold Up to $15K Worth of American Tower Stock
summary: A report on May 12, 2026 shows that Representative Richard Dean Dr McCormick from Georgia sale stock in American Tower (NYSE:AMT), valued between $1,001 and $15,000. According to the May filing, the transaction occurred on April 17, 2026. At the time of writing, American Tower shares are trading down 3.47% at $176.76. To stay updated on Richard Dean Dr McCormick's trades and other congressional trades, try our government trades tool for live updates! The Importance of Congressional Transactions

headline: American Tower Corporation (AMT) Among the Best Data Center REITs To Buy Now
summary: ​American Tower Corporation (NYSE:AMT) is a global real estate investment trust focused on owning, operating, and developing multitenant communications real estate, with a portfolio of nearly 150,000 sites leased to wireless carriers, broadcasters, and government. The company also maintains a smaller US Data Centers segment featuring edge and metro facilities. It is also one of […]
